headlines.headline: Tom Dundon doesn't plan to contribute to Portland arena upgrades
headlines.description: Trail Blazers governor Tom Dundon is digging in his heels that public money only should fund a $600 million makeover of the Moda Center.

headlines.headline: Fantasy basketball: LaMelo takes some heat off Anthony Edwards
headlines.description: Andre Snellings breaks down the LaMelo Ball trade and what it means in terms of fantasy in his new home of Minnesota.

headlines.headline: Sources: Coby White to re-sign with Hornets on 3-year, $74M deal
headlines.description: Guard Coby White intends to sign a three-year, $74 million deal to return to the Hornets, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

headlines.headline: Panthers acquire gritty winger Garnet Hathaway from Flyers
headlines.description: The Florida Panthers ensured they would not lose any of their grit with A.J. Greer expected to depart in free agency by acquiring Garnet Hathaway from the Philadelphia Flyers in a trade Thursday.
